tasks.context: Create /health/orchestrator GET endpoint in backend/src/routes/health.ts. Return JSON with {status, lastTaskId, runningTime, queueDepth}. Use existing logger patterns. 50 lines max.
In backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts, wrap task execution with 5min timeout. Log timeout, mark task failed, continue next. Use Promise.race pattern. Prevent infinite hangs.
In backend/src/services/task-complexity-validator.ts, add validateContextSize() that fails tasks with context >500 chars. Return {valid:boolean, reason:string}. Prevent truncation cascades.
In backend/src/utils/graceful-shutdown.ts, add registerOrchestrator() that saves queue state to Redis on SIGTERM. Restore on restart. Use existing Redis client. Enable recovery.
